evidence.observed: HN Search documents programmatic GET access to search, date-sorted search, and item endpoints with a 10,000-request-per-hour IP limit.
HN Search identifies itself as a real-time full-text search service for Hacker News community content.

local_policy.operation: documented HN Search GET checks only
local_policy.basis: JobSentinel conservative ceiling below the documented 10,000-request-per-hour IP limit.

change_triggers: API documentation or rate limit changes
